name: Digital Consulting & Advisory
description: Strategic IT consulting covering cloud strategy, digital transformation roadmaps, IT operating model design, and technology architecture advisory. Helps enterprise CIOs and CTOs define their modernization path and build business cases for transformation investments.
positioning: Implementation-aware consulting that connects strategy to delivery. Unlike pure-play consultancies, recommendations are grounded in operational reality because T-Systems also runs the infrastructure.
competitive_moat: Strategy-to-operations integration, deep regulated industry expertise
